text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

===>  Building package for callweaver-1.2.1_1 
tar: etc/callweaver/chan_dahdi.conf.sample: Cannot stat: No such file or directory 
tar: etc/callweaver/sccp.conf.sample: Cannot stat: No such file or directory 
tar: Error exit delayed from previous errors. 
pkg_create: make_dist: tar command failed with code 256 
Creating package /tmp/packages/All/callweaver-1.2.1_1.tbz 
Registering depends: speex-1.2.r1_2,1 libvorbis-1.2.3_1,3 libogg-1.1.4,4 spandsp-devel-0.0.6.p12_1 popt-1.14 gettext-0.17_1 libiconv-1.13.1 tiff-3.9.2 jbigkit-1.6 jpeg-7. 
Creating bzip'd tar ball in '/tmp/packages/All/callweaver-1.2.1_1.tbz' 
*** Error code 1 

Stop in /a/ports/net/callweaver. 
Deleting callweaver-1.2.1_1 
pkg_delete: file '/usr/local/etc/callweaver/chan_dahdi.conf.sample' doesn't exist 
pkg_delete: file '/usr/local/etc/callweaver/sccp.conf.sample' doesn't exist 
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory '//var/log/callweaver' 
pkg_delete: couldn't entirely delete package (perhaps the packing list is 
incorrectly specified?) 
================================================================
